title: VC markup dynamics, Russia/US tensions over Ukraine, Altos Labs raises $3B, Stripe mafia & more
description:
0:00 Chamath's preferred cosplay

1:35 Reflecting on bad investment decisions and markup dynamics

15:20 Rising tensions between US and Russia over Ukraine, Putin's demands, NATO negotiations as the underreported key piece, Obama's savvy Russia dealings

39:16 Bill Ackman buys the Netflix dip, Tesla and Microsoft crush earnings, the Fed signals rate hikes

55:18 Altos Labs raises $3B in the largest Seed round ever, incredible Yamanaka factors breakthrough, dynamics of a richly capitalized bio-moonshot

1:04:08 The Stripe Mafia, Bolt CEO punches up, reflecting on old emails

analysis.summary: The episode covers various topics including VC markup dynamics, rising tensions between the US and Russia over Ukraine, Altos Labs' $3B seed round, and the Stripe Mafia. The hosts also discuss Bill Ackman's investment in Netflix and the Fed's signal for rate hikes. The conversation touches on Obama's Russia dealings and the importance of NATO negotiations. The hosts also reflect on their past investment decisions and the dynamics of a richly capitalized bio-moonshot.

takeaways.text: VC markup dynamics are crucial for investment decisions
Rising US-Russia tensions over Ukraine are underreported
Altos Labs raises $3B in the largest Seed round ever
The Stripe Mafia is a significant force in the startup ecosystem
Bill Ackman's investment in Netflix is a notable market move
The Fed's signal for rate hikes will impact the market
Obama's Russia dealings were savvy and effective
NATO negotiations are a key piece in the US-Russia tensions

sentiment.notes: The hosts express a range of emotions, from concern about the US-Russia tensions to excitement about the Altos Labs seed round. The overall sentiment is mixed, reflecting the complexity of the topics discussed.

notable_moments.description: The hosts start discussing the rising tensions between the US and Russia over Ukraine
The hosts discuss Altos Labs' $3B seed round
The hosts talk about the Stripe Mafia
